title: Aurora World 60164 8-inch Beefeater Bear
features: From Aurora's highly popular Souvenir Collection
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials
Adorable Teddy Bear dressed in Traditional British Beefeater Outfit
Children will love this soft and huggable Teddy Bear
description: Product Description Aurora’s Beefeater Bear is a highly detailed London souvenir teddy bear. He has a loveable face and wearing an exquisitely hand crafted Beefeater outfit. This gorgeous bear makes the perfect gift for anyone who loves teddy bears and plush soft toys. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products. Box Contains 1 x Aurora World Beefeater Bear 8In
